understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to position selectable pieces (P and S) onto goal markers (+) within the step limit, likely by maneuvering them horizontally or vertically while possibly interacting with blocks and walls.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) by 3 pixels (one cell) in the direction unless blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; pushable objects like blocks (B) can be pushed if adjacent. CLICK switches control to another selectable (S) at the exact target_position coordinates, costing a step but instantly changing selection without physical movement. Multiple selectables exist on the grid, and actions reveal behaviors like blocking.
